step_rationale: MPO-catalyzed LDL modification; drives foam cell formation and endothelial dysfunction.
mechanism: Myeloperoxidase-oxidized LDL is an inflammatory lipoprotein modification that promotes foam cell differentiation and endothelial dysfunction.

references.title: Theeffect of myeloperoxidase oxidized LDL on THP-1 derived macrophages.
The effect of myeloperoxidase-oxidized LDL on THP-1 macrophage polarization and repolarization.
Myeloperoxidase-Oxidized LDL Activates Human Aortic Endothelial Cells through the LOX-1 Scavenger Receptor.
